title: Tallon Christmas Eve Pack – Includes Santa Placemat, Nice List Certificate, Door Hanger, Santa’s Magic Key & Footprint Stencils – Fun Activity Set for Kids
features: CHRISTMAS EVE PACK – Complete activity set designed to make Christmas Eve extra special and magical for children
INCLUDES 5 ITEMS – Pack contains Santa placemat, Nice List certificate, festive door hanger, Santa’s magic key and footprint stencils
FUN FAMILY TRADITION – Perfect for children to prepare treats for Santa and Rudolph, hang up their certificate and wait for surprises
SPARKS IMAGINATION – Footprint stencils and Santa’s key create excitement, adding a sense of wonder to Christmas morning
GREAT FOR KIDS – An affordable and thoughtful way to build anticipation, ideal as a festive activity, stocking filler or family gift
description: Make Christmas Eve extra magical for children with this Tallon Christmas Eve Pack, designed to bring excitement and festive spirit to the night before Christmas. This fun and interactive activity set includes everything kids need to prepare for Santa’s arrival, making it a memorable tradition the whole family can enjoy. The pack contains a colourful Santa placemat to leave treats and drinks, a Nice List certificate to reward good behaviour, a festive door hanger to remind Santa to stop by, a special Santa’s magic key so he can get inside, and Santa’s footprint stencils to create snowy prints for children to discover in the morning. Perfect for sparking imagination and building anticipation, this activity set helps children feel part of the Christmas magic. Whether it’s laying out snacks for Santa and Rudolph, proudly displaying their Nice List certificate, or waking up to Santa’s snowy footprints, every detail adds to the wonder of Christmas Eve. Affordable, fun, and family-friendly, this set makes a thoughtful gift or stocking filler and is sure to become a much-loved festive tradition year after year.
